title: Please stop adding new features automatically
excerpt:
Hi monday.com Team 
Please refrain from activating new features in the future without giving the admins the opportunity to decide on them. It’s simply annoying that we now have to deal with countless “requests” just beca…

posts.author: ll4mat (Knecht Rootrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com Team

Please refrain from activating new features in the future without giving the admins the opportunity to decide on them. It’s simply annoying that we now have to deal with countless “requests” just because You have added that “AI Assistant” button to every board.
